title: hapalochilus chrysochilus
intro: Hapalochilus chrysochilus is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is also known as the golden jewel plant and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Hapalochilus chrysochilus include its potential to treat fever and skin conditions, while its leaves are also used to treat digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and it can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for herbal use.
